modules.name: alea
modules.description: Add a random module to your rack.

modules.name: interea
modules.description: Make a chord from a V/Oct input, with quality, voicing and inversion. Harmonize option.

modules.name: cumuli
modules.description: Accumulator with up and down gates and rates.

modules.name: pavo
modules.description: Spreader of polyphonic mono signals across the stereo field (Splay Ugen).

modules.name: limen
modules.description: TCP + JSON interface for controlling VCV Rack from external tools (e.g. Emacs).

modules.name: MMCCCXCIX
modules.description: PT2399 delay chip emulation with feedback send/return loop.

modules.name: scando
modules.description: Scanned-synthesis oscillator: a vibrating mass-spring string scanned into an evolving wavetable.

modules.name: pellicula
modules.description: Exploded 8-voice drum sampler: per-voice sample/pitch/decay/level with knob + CV, poly-normalled matrix, per-voice/poly/mix outs.

modules.name: dræn
modules.description: Drone synthesizer: two banks of 37 drone engines (dronecaster ports + hyf originals) played from fundamental (hz) and level (amp), with fading engine selection.

modules.name: rete
modules.description: Feedback integrator network: 8 nodes, random mixing matrix, self-oscillating chaos with per-node gain CVs.

modules.name: ululo
modules.description: Feedback guitar: six comb strings and a saturating amp in a howling loop, chord-tunable via poly V/oct.

modules.name: tabes
modules.description: Disintegration looper: the tape loop degrades a little more on every pass (HF loss, saturation, hiss, dropouts, wow).

modules.name: lustro
modules.description: Scanned filter: scando's mass-spring string drives the band gains of a 16-band resonant filterbank.

modules.name: bulla
modules.description: Rob Hordijk's Blippoo Box: two cross-modulating oscillators, two runglers and a twin-peak filter, between pattern and chaos.
